languages.text: Полуразложившееся тело человека сильно обезображено, однако вы все равно замечаете на гниющем лице следы мутаций.
The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.
languages.original_text: Полуразложившееся тело человека сильно обезображено, однако вы все равно замечаете на гниющем лице следы мутаций.

traits.locale_text: The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you still make out the mutation marks on the rotting face.
The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.
The partially decomposed human body has thoroughly disintegrated, but you still make out the mutation marks on the rotting face.
The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you still make out the mutation marks on the rotting face.
The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.

languages.text: 部分的に腐敗した人間の体は完全に分解したが、腐敗した顔には変異の痕跡がまだ見られる。
languages.original_text: The partially decomposed human body has thoroughly disintegrated, but you still make out the mutation marks on the rotting face.

traits.locale_text: 部分的に腐敗した人間の体は完全に分解したが、腐敗した顔には変異の痕跡がまだ見られる。

languages.text: Kısmen çürümüş insan bedeni epey şekil değiştirmiş olsa da çürüyen yüzündeki mutasyon izlerini hâlâ seçebiliyorsun.
languages.original_text: The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.

traits.locale_text: Kısmen çürümüş insan bedeni epey şekil değiştirmiş olsa da çürüyen yüzündeki mutasyon izlerini hâlâ seçebiliyorsun.

languages.text: El cadáver humano, parcialmente descompuesto, ha quedado notablemente desfigurado, pero sigues distinguiendo indicios de mutación en la cara putrefacta.
languages.original_text: The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.

traits.locale_text: El cadáver humano, parcialmente descompuesto, ha quedado notablemente desfigurado, pero sigues distinguiendo indicios de mutación en la cara putrefacta.

languages.text: 那具半腐烂的人类遗体已经严重变形，但你仍能从那张腐败的脸上辨认出变异的痕迹。
languages.original_text: The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.

traits.locale_text: 那具半腐烂的人类遗体已经严重变形，但你仍能从那张腐败的脸上辨认出变异的痕迹。

languages.text: Bien que ce cadavre humain ait été considérablement défiguré, vous reconnaissez des marques de mutation sur son visage putréfié.
languages.original_text: The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.

traits.locale_text: Bien que ce cadavre humain ait été considérablement défiguré, vous reconnaissez des marques de mutation sur son visage putréfié.

languages.text: Der teilweise verweste menschliche Leichnam ist stark entstellt, aber du erkennst noch immer die Zeichen der Mutation auf dem verrotteten Gesicht.
languages.original_text: The partially decomposed human body has been considerably disfigured, but you can still make out the signs of mutation on the rotting face.

traits.locale_text: Der teilweise verweste menschliche Leichnam ist stark entstellt, aber du erkennst noch immer die Zeichen der Mutation auf dem verrotteten Gesicht.
